texto: If only there was enough space on this tiny card to evoke my unfettered joie de vivre for what you have done. The gaiety, the mirth, the heavenly bubbling of every effusive cell that sings inside me for your kind and pithy offering.
explicacao: Citação de Joshua Braff sobre temas ligados a gratidao. “If only there was enough space on this tiny card to evoke my unfettered joie de vivre for what yo…” articula gratidao, sarcasm, thank-you em registro de gratidao, com relevância para contextos como thank-you.
